title: Medical Records Requester Agent
shortDescription: Drafts the HIPAA-compliant requests, tracks every provider response, and chases the records that don't arrive on time.

seo.title: AI Medical Records Requester Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Draft HIPAA-compliant requests, track every provider response, and chase the records that don't arrive on time. The PI workflow that disappears into a queue.

hero.headline: AI Medical Records Requester Agent
hero.subheadline: HIPAA-compliant request drafted per provider, tracked through the response window, and chased on the schedule each provider needs. The records-request workflow that consumes paralegal weeks, handled in a queue with attorney visibility.
bullets: HIPAA-compliant request drafted per provider with the right authorizations attached
Automatic chase cadence on overdue requests
Cost-recovery tracking against statutory rates per state

scenario.heading: The records request you would have lost track of
paragraphs: A personal injury matter has records pending from 7 providers across 14 months of treatment. In the old workflow, the paralegal drafts the requests, sends them, and tries to track who responded with a spreadsheet that gets out of date by week 3. The Medical Records Requester sends each request with the right authorizations, watches the inbox for responses, follows up at the statutory deadline, and surfaces the 2 providers who are nonresponsive after 60 days. The records that take 14 weeks instead of 6 stop being silent failures.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Medical Records Requester does
bullets: Drafts HIPAA-compliant records requests per provider with the right authorization forms
Tracks each request against the provider's typical response window and the statutory limit
Follows up on overdue requests at the cadence each provider needs
Logs costs as records arrive and tracks them against statutory rates per state
Surfaces nonresponsive providers for paralegal escalation

integrations: Practice management system for matter and provider records
Email for the request and follow-up layer
Document management system for the records archive as they arrive
Records-request platforms (RecordTrak, Briefpoint Health, Record Reports) where used

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: Authorizations and request letters are reviewed by the responsible attorney before the first request goes out on a matter. After the matter is approved for automated requests, the agent operates within the authorized scope. For unusual requests (subpoenaed records, court-ordered productions), the workflow escalates to the attorney.

faq.question: What about providers who refuse the standard authorization?
faq.answer: Some providers (large hospital systems, specialized clinics) require their own authorization forms. The agent maintains a per-provider authorization library and uses the right form when it has it. For new providers without a known requirement, the agent uses the standard HIPAA authorization and adapts when the provider responds with a specific request.

faq.question: How does this work with records-request platforms?
faq.answer: The agent can run the requests directly or coordinate with platforms like RecordTrak when your firm uses them. The platform handles the network of providers; the agent handles the matter-level orchestration (which records to request, when to chase, when to escalate).
